title: claude-router: local embedding-based model-tier and scaffold routing for Claude
description: claude-router is an AI reliability tool that classifies each prompt locally with an embedding model, then routes it to the right Claude tier and prepends a task-specific scaffold only when scaffolding measurably improves quality — closing the silent failure mode where teams default to Sonnet or Opus and overspend without a repeatable rule for when a cheaper tier plus structure is enough.
